overview: A full-featured political organization portal for ২নং কপিলমুনি ইউনিয়ন ছাত্রদল (2 No. Kapil Muni Union Chhatra Dal). Features member registration with admin approval workflow, premium animated dashboard, group chat, notice board, gallery, and a comprehensive admin panel with A-Z control over all organization data.
features: Password-only admin panel login with full organizational control
Member registration with admin approval and digital signature
Premium animated user dashboard with member stats and grid
Group chat for all approved members
Site settings: change website name, center name, upazila, union
Notice board, photo gallery, alumni, achievements, library sections
